description: Premarital agreement. Dated 23 Sivan 5506 AM (1746 CE). Between the groom Elʿazar b. Shelomo known as Fayruz with the bride Ṣipora d. Shʿaya b. Naḥūm. Location: probably Cairo, the house of Yosef b. Binyamin Rūmi known as Zoref, in front of the witnesses Yaʿaqov and Naḥūm Kohen. the sons of Aharon Kohen known as Hatum, and the 'members' (חברים). Signed by Eliyahu Rofe Hazan. AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
